title: Trailer 2 discussion thread
wikitext:
[]: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 19, 2019 6:05 am Trailer 2 Trailer 2.5 Sn002 C010 SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Jul 19, 2019 6:19 am Thanks for your work

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 19, 2019 6:21 am Oh god, I was right about an Eva getting combined with the Jet Alone 2 parts... I just managed to be completely wrong about WHICH Eva. <_< Though in retrospect, it should have been super obvious... JA-02, Eva-02... SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Fri Jul 19, 2019 6:25 am EDIT: Never mind.

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 19, 2019 6:48 am Giji Shinka wrote: The fact that Eva-13 is restrained in the "early Eva control system" cross from 3.0 implies that someone is going to be put into the core, just like Yui.

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Jul 19, 2019 6:53 am Any thoughts on who the woman is with Fuyutsuki? Could be Yui? Edit: Or just Rei I guess lol.

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by andreh » Fri Jul 19, 2019 7:10 am Its just me or there is an strange "thing" in the sun(?) in Wunder take? Could it be the GUFO? Is Wunder diving in the Impact vortex thing?

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 19, 2019 7:15 am andreh wrote: Its just me or there is an strange "thing" in the sun(?) in Wunder take? Could it be the GUFO?

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 19, 2019 7:17 am If Rei Q has an expression that blank 54 scenes into the movie, then I am greatly concerned.

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 19, 2019 7:19 am So, Wunder is powered in Sn299. It means Shinji will get inside Unit 01 after Unit 02 and Wunders fails to do what they are trying to do.

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by Ollow » Fri Jul 19, 2019 8:12 am Was winding down from work when I saw this. Thanks for the heads up! I watched the actual trailer on the EVA-EXTRA android app. Apparently the trailer will be properly available on youtube on the King Record Official Channal (JP) by the 20th July, 8PM Japan time. source: https://www.evangelion.co.jp/news/shineva_0719/ ＜2019年7月19日18時20分更新＞ 公式アプリ「EVA-EXTRA」内にて特報2を公開いたしました。 YouTube(キングレコードオフィシャルチャンネル)公開は明日20日午後を予定しております。 どうぞ、よろしくお願いいたします。

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jul 19, 2019 8:44 am Reichu wrote: So... Gendo uses the key on himself (key's biological component, or some aspect thereof, gets sucked up into the chamber and becomes injectable) and goes into Eva-13...

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 19, 2019 9:05 am ^ HOT.

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by Salt » Fri Jul 19, 2019 10:20 am Between "Deputy Commander Fuyutsuki must be testing us" and now Fuyutsuki's...rather sinister look in this trailer, a small part of me thinks the twist is going to be that Fuyutsuki is the true villain.

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Jul 19, 2019 10:37 am It's going to be a very red film. Also, I'm thinking the lack of Unit-01 hints that it will have a crucial role in the end which will not get spoiled.

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 19, 2019 10:46 am I could see him maybe betraying Gendo for Yui's sake (whatever the hell Gendo and Fuyu, let alone Yui are planning this time around!) but mentally I'm trying to wrap my brain around other stuff. More scenes (flashbacks, I guess) to what the other cast besides Shinji were thinking and feeling in Eva Q would certainly be interesting, but at the same time, how well would that fit? (Besides flashbacks, I mean.) Perhaps metaphysical Instrumentality if Instrumentality is still A Thing in these films... I'm definitely intrigued to see where everything goes, but given how Eva Q went in a direction nobody foresaw, I won't trust anything until the film's actually out

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by Caroline L.S. » Fri Jul 19, 2019 11:14 am I wonder if the lack of any story and particularly scarce use of Asuka and Shinji is a good thing or real bummer. I mean, sure they dont want to spoil it in trailers and if so, they are doing great job. Still I wonder. How the hell is Asukas plugsuit white on the shoulders in 3.33 and grey in this trailer. Screw this! I have that plugsuit with white parts. I am not gonna get one with grey.

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jul 19, 2019 11:19 am If some sort of world altering event happened right now, if Jesus the Christ himself came back to Earth, if aliens visited us, anything of that sort, I wouldn't give a shit. This is more important. This is the thing. My eyes have never felt greater pleasure. Thank you Anno, thank you khara, thank you Japan, thank you pencils used to draw things. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Jul 19, 2019 11:37 am Sn299 C001 - Nigoki got that Roadblock from GI Joe thang going on. Sn134 C017- Mari making with the come to bed eyes is a thing I like.

[]: Re: Trailer 2 discussion thread             Quote Post by amitakartok » Fri Jul 19, 2019 12:21 pm I'm uncertain whether the closeup to the Rei face at Sn143 C003 is supposed to be Rei or Yui. She's most definitely not a fresh Rei, judging from the expression. Hmm... when Rei went into Unit 01 at the end of 2.0, the Eva now had two souls inside. Could it be possible to pull one of them out without knocking the Eva out of commission (since it still has a control entity, thus it should still work)? So, Rei got exchanged for Yui, who in turn was used in Unit 13 and now Fuyutsuki pulled her out into a Rei body while Rei II is the one powering the Wunder right now and Shinji was lied to about her missing because WILLE needed the Wunder operational? Or maybe it's Rei II who got pulled out and dumped into Unit 13, hence Ritsuko's claim in the last film that she wasn't found in Unit 01 and why Shinji was able to solo pilot Unit 13 after Kaworu was disconnected.
